behavior_summary: U8P_BUBLAST::anim runs as the per-tick/animation handler for a BUBLAST item: it sets the item's visual frame and records the item's world coordinates (X, Y, Z).
It immediately spawns/creates helper effects/resources (via FREE::1A96 -> spawn FREE::1C19 and a FIRESPEL::1F65 spawn) to represent the blast effect.
The routine scans a region around the blast by testing tile positions with Item::overlaps and collects overlapping items into a temporary list.

It iterates that list looking specifically for items matching a type test (Item::getType == 0x60) and additional shape/index checks; if any such target is found a local flag is cleared/updated and further actions occur.

When a valid target is detected the function calls FREE::1A96 again, computes a direction from the blast origin to the target with Item::getDirFromCoords and invokes METHOD::0080 (item, target, direction) to orient/dispatch additional behavior toward that target.
Finally, the temporary list is freed/cleaned up before the function returns.
notable_control_flow: Start: set visual state (Item::setFrame) then store origin X/Y/Z (Item::getX/Y/Z).
Spawn sequence: call FREE::1A96, spawn FREE::1C19 with retval, spawn FIRESPEL::1F65 for visual effect.
Spatial scan: loop over adjacent tiles/positions, call Item::overlaps per tile and push overlapping items into a temp list handle ([BP-06h]).

Filtering loop: foreach item in temp list, call Item::getType and perform additional comparisons to decide if it is a valid target; maintain a found-flag ([BP-07h]) initialized to 1 and cleared to 0 on match.
On match: call FREE::1A96 again, compute direction via Item::getDirFromCoords using saved origin coords, then call METHOD::0080(item, targetTile, direction).
Cleanup: free the temporary list/handle and exit.
open_questions: What exact object/resource FREE::1A96 allocates/configures and what internal state its retval encodes (appears to be a helper/effect handle but exact semantics are unknown).
What precisely type 0x60 represents (inferred to be the kind of object the blast should target) and the meaning of the additional shape/index comparisons used to accept/reject candidates.
What side-effects METHOD::0080 performs on the target tile/item (inferred to orient/dispatch the blast but exact game effects are unclear).
Whether the scan radius/tile iteration pattern has additional constraints (e.g., Z-level matching) beyond the observed overlap checks.

main_function.name: U8P_BUBLAST::anim
main_function.purpose: Perform a single animation/update for a BUBLAST item: set its frame, spawn visual/effect helpers, scan nearby tiles for valid targets, and, if targets are found, create/orient additional blast behavior toward them.
entry_conditions: Event 2 (U8P_BUBLAST::anim) — invoked by the engine as the item's animation/update tick (runs periodically or when the item is active).

function_map.name: U8P_BUBLAST::anim
function_map.role: Per-tick/animation handler that implements blast spawn, target scanning, and dispatching orientation/behavior toward found targets.

function_map.name: FREE::1A96
function_map.role: Allocates or configures a temporary helper/effect handle used by the blast (retval passed to spawn/other routines).

function_map.name: FREE::1C19
function_map.role: Spawned process/task that materializes a helper/free effect for the blast (spawned with retval from FREE::1A96).

function_map.name: FIRESPEL::1F65
function_map.role: Spawned visual/spell effect (fire/spell) associated with the blast.

function_map.name: Item::setFrame
function_map.role: Set the BUBLAST item's visual frame at the start of the animation.

function_map.name: Item::getX
function_map.role: Get item's X coordinate for origin storage.

function_map.name: Item::getY
function_map.role: Get item's Y coordinate for origin storage.

function_map.name: Item::getZ
function_map.role: Get item's Z/level for origin storage.

function_map.name: Item::overlaps
function_map.role: Test whether blast overlaps a candidate tile/item (used while building the temp list).

function_map.name: Item::getType
function_map.role: Return candidate item's type used to filter targets (compared to 0x60).

function_map.name: Item::getDirFromCoords
function_map.role: Compute direction from blast origin to a target coordinate for orienting subsequent behavior.

function_map.name: METHOD::0080
function_map.role: Apply an oriented action/behavior to a target tile/item using the computed direction (likely dispatches or aims the blast).

external_calls.purpose: Set the BUBLAST item's visual frame at animation start.
Read and store blast origin X coordinate.
Read and store blast origin Y coordinate.
Read and store blast origin Z/level.
Allocate/configure a helper/effect handle used by subsequent spawn or effect actions (called twice: initial spawn and when target found).
Spawn a helper/free process using the handle returned by FREE::1A96.
Spawn a fire/spell visual effect associated with the blast.
Test per-tile overlap to collect nearby/overlapping items into a temporary list for target filtering.
Filter collected items by type (compares to 0x60) as part of target selection.
Compute the direction from the stored blast origin (saved X/Y) to a found target for orientation.
Invoke the engine-level method to apply the computed direction and behavior to a target tile/item (likely orients or dispatches the blast effect).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_BUBLAST::anim runs as the per-tick/animation handler for a BUBLAST item: it sets the item's visual frame and records the item's world coordinates (X, Y, Z).
